titles.title: Be Still and Know That I Am the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Be still and know that I am The Lord, Be still and know that I am The Lord, Be still and know that I am The Lord,

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I am the Lord that healeth thee, I am the Lord that healeth thee, I am the Lord that healeth thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In thee O Lord, do I put my trust, In thee O Lord, do I put my trust, In thee O Lord, do I put my trust.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Naujue, mimi ni Bwana, Naujue, mimi ni Bwana, Naujue, mimi ni Bwana.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Mimi ni Bwana, Ninaponya, Mimi ni Bwana, Ninaponya, Mimi ni Bwana, Ninaponya.
